name: Phase E - Release Closeout, Evidence Ledger, And Growth Handoff
decision: Phase E is complete as a closeout and handoff workstream. It does not approve release. Public release, growth scaling, experiments, and SEO expansion remain blocked until the listed owner tasks pass verification.

extraLayer.name: Release Evidence Authority And Remediation Control Model
extraLayer.purpose: Add a control layer above the E-1 through E-5 task evidence so completed documentation cannot be mistaken for release approval.

controls.name: Evidence authority and privacy gate
controls.policy: Keep executed, supplied, unavailable, and failed evidence separate. Do not treat unavailable platform access as pass. Do not persist raw private markers or secrets in reports.
controls.acceptance: All final artifacts stay sanitized, platform gaps are labeled unavailable, and public/private route exposure is fixed before launch.

controls.name: Source parity and Figma Make gate
controls.policy: Local source and Figma Make preview must agree before handoff.
controls.acceptance: Patch the E-1 /Figma/src file list and verify the preview no longer throws stale runtime errors.

controls.name: Provider, hosting, and secret-safe readback gate
controls.policy: Provider state must be read back from authenticated APIs without printing or storing secrets.
controls.acceptance: Cloudflare, hosting, headers, redirects, deployment target, Supabase function parity, and SEO asset serving are verified against the intended resources.

controls.name: Live runtime and search eligibility gate
controls.policy: Live HTTP/browser evidence controls release, not local intent.
controls.acceptance: Public/private route boundary, robots, sitemaps, Merchant feed, legacy redirects, product ID-to-slug redirects, route status codes, and checkout navigation pass live verification.

controls.name: Drift baseline and monitoring gate
controls.policy: Baseline evidence is a comparison contract, not a ranking prediction.
controls.acceptance: After remediation, rerun crawl, browser smoke, static asset checks, redirect checks, schema checks, and platform readbacks; record deltas against the E-4 baseline.

controls.name: Final release and growth classification gate
controls.policy: Gate D launch and Gate E growth cannot pass with unresolved blockers.
controls.acceptance: Reclassify only after P0 blockers are closed and P1 blockers are fixed or owner-excepted with mitigation, monitoring, and expiry.

controls.name: Remediation acceptance and handoff gate
controls.policy: No next-phase growth work starts until remediation evidence is captured in the same board discipline.
controls.acceptance: Each blocker has owner, fix evidence, exact verification command or provider readback, regression check, and handoff status before the release decision is reopened.

phaseTaskResults.name: Figma Make Patch-State Ledger
phaseTaskResults.summary: Local/Figma source differences were inventoried; Figma Make owner patch and preview verification remain required.

phaseTaskResults.name: Supabase, Hosting, And Provider Ledger
phaseTaskResults.summary: Supabase/local provider evidence was recorded; Cloudflare/authenticated hosting readback and deployed asset parity remain blocked.

phaseTaskResults.name: Live Crawl And Browser Smoke Evidence
phaseTaskResults.summary: Live evidence found public/private boundary, SEO asset, redirect, route status, and checkout navigation blockers.

phaseTaskResults.name: Drift Baseline And Monitoring Handoff
phaseTaskResults.summary: A drift baseline and monitoring handoff were recorded; it must be rerun after remediation.

phaseTaskResults.name: Final Growth Readiness Classification
phaseTaskResults.summary: Mitra was classified as not growth-ready and release no-go.

blockingFindings.verification: Unauthenticated /cms and private/admin/account routes return 401, 403, or safe 404; no private content renders.

blockingFindings.finding: SEO static assets and Merchant feed are not deployed correctly.
blockingFindings.verification: robots.txt returns 200 text/plain; sitemap.xml, product sitemap, and Merchant feed return XML with expected bodies.

blockingFindings.finding: Figma Make source is stale and preview remains unverified.
blockingFindings.verification: Patch the E-1 /Figma/src list and verify preview no longer throws CONTACT_INFO or stale import errors.

blockingFindings.finding: Legacy redirects and opaque product ID redirects are not active on the public www host.
blockingFindings.verification: Legacy samples and product ID/SKU/code samples permanently redirect one hop to canonical slug URLs.

blockingFindings.finding: Invalid and accidental route variants are HTTP 200 soft-404s.
blockingFindings.verification: Unknown routes return 404 or 410; intentional variants redirect to canonical equivalents.

blockingFindings.finding: Checkout can render on a product URL after cart action.
blockingFindings.verification: Checkout navigation updates to /checkout, stays noindex, and does not corrupt product canonical state.
Authenticated account, zone, Pages/project, routes, headers, redirects, and deployment state are read back without secrets.

blockingFindings.finding: Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, analytics, logs, and field performance are unavailable.
blockingFindings.verification: Authenticated readback confirms ownership, submitted assets, diagnostics, events, conversions, and field evidence.

blockingFindings.finding: Paytrail checkout revalidation deployed parity is unverified.
blockingFindings.verification: Deploy/read back payments_create_paytrail after local revalidation work and verify server-side price/stock revalidation.

figmaMakeSync.policy: None. This wrap-up created docs/evidence artifacts only. Figma Make source files still need the E-1 owner patch list.

acceptanceToReopenReleaseDecision: All P0 blockers are verified closed.
Each P1 blocker is either verified closed or owner-excepted with mitigation, monitoring, expiry, and rollback policy.
Figma Make preview and local source parity are verified.
Authenticated provider and platform readbacks are captured without secrets.
Live crawl, browser smoke, redirect, sitemap, schema, Merchant feed, checkout, and drift checks pass after deployment.
Growth and experiment work remains paused until Gate D and Gate E are reclassified.
next: Owner remediation of P0/P1 blockers before any release, growth scaling, or experiment launch.
noGuarantee: This wrap-up governs release evidence quality and growth readiness classification. It does not guarantee crawling, indexing, selected canonicals, rankings, rich results, local-pack visibility, Merchant Center approval, traffic, conversions, revenue, or AI inclusion.
